## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SmithAI's content strategy and programmatic approach for improving SEO and online presence.](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating a hub-and-spoke content structure, starting with wireframes for both hub and spoke pages](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Prioritize AI receptionist content while integrating it with virtual receptionist offerings as part of a future hybrid solution](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Implement a programmatic approach for feature + industry pages, starting with top 10 industries based on search volume](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Begin link-building efforts immediately while developing the programmatic content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving towards a hub-and-spoke model for content organization](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Creating comprehensive landing pages that combine AI tools, marketing strategies, and industry-specific information](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Focusing on high-utility content that provides actionable information for users](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Incorporating visual elements like diagrams to show how different tools and strategies connect](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)

### Programmatic Content Approach

  - [Identified clusters for content creation, including AI tools for various industries/job functions](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Exploring feature + industry combinations (e.g., "24/7 answering for real estate lawyers")](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Aiming to create templated, scalable content that can be easily customized for different industries or use cases](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Planning to start with top 10 industries based on search volume for each content type](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

### SmithAI Product Evolution

  - [Developing a hybrid solution combining AI receptionists and virtual receptionists (to be launched this quarter)](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Shifting focus from separate products to a modular approach where clients can choose deployment options](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Need to adjust content strategy to reflect this upcoming change in product offering](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Utilizing Webflow for creating customizable components and landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Planning to create wireframes for both hub and spoke pages before developing content](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Considering bringing in Julian (new senior growth lead) for Webflow expertise and guidance](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### Content Performance Tracking

  - [Setting up a Looker studio dashboard for tracking published content performance](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Planning to include a monthly check-in during meetings to review content traction and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Currently working on improving data presentation methods for easier analysis](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create wireframes for hub and spoke pages to visualize the overall content structure](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Develop a blueprint for cross-linking between different content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Share current content performance data via Slack and prepare for regular updates in weekly meetings](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [Schedule next meeting for Friday (3:30 PM Eastern) to review wireframes and discuss content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Continue link-building efforts and provide updates on progress in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/JWMXF9mSNwygtPzE4efu5i-6syYMKfpj?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
